projectDescription: A Telegram bot that delivers daily curated Steam game deals using a two-layer hybrid filter: deterministic rules first, then GPT-4o-mini for intelligent curation.
keyFeatures: Two-layer hybrid filtering: deterministic rules (Metacritic, Steam rating, price, discount) followed by GPT-4o-mini AI curation
Daily automated broadcasts via Telegram cron scheduler (configurable, defaults to 9am Bogotá time)
Smart snapshot caching: skips GPT calls when candidate list hasn't changed, reducing API costs
Deduplication system prevents the same games from being notified within a configurable window
AI fallback to last valid daily snapshot if OpenAI is unavailable
Rate limiting on /deals command (45s cooldown per chat) to prevent abuse
Configurable filter thresholds via environment variables (no code changes needed)
publicApiSurface: fetchDeals() — query-only pipeline; serves from snapshot if fresh
fetchAndMarkDeals() — pipeline + marks results as notified (used by cron)
applyHardFilters(deals, options, notifiedIds) — pure deterministic filter layer 1
buildFilteredDeals(candidates, selection) — reconstruct FilteredDeal[] from AI selection
notifyAllUsers(message) — broadcast HTML message to all subscribers
startScheduler() — start the daily cron job
registerCommands(bot) — register all Telegram bot commands
